agent_interpretation_event.audit_explanation: Multiple sources (technician, customer, support notes) indicate the modem is now green and service is stable after an activation retry. CRM, billing, and dispatch statuses are all clear/complete. The initial failure appears to have been an activation issue that is now resolved.
agent_interpretation_event.customer_impact_summary: Customer experienced frustration due to multiple callbacks and activation issues, but service is now reported as stable and modem is green.
evidence_gaps: Confirmation of authoritative network telemetry status.

extracted_claims.value: service looks stable after activation retry.
Customer is frustrated after a third callback

agent_interpretation_event.operator_note: Case appears resolved based on technician, customer, and support notes. Modem is green, service stable, and all backend systems are clear. Recommending closure candidate, pending authoritative telemetry verification by policy engine.
recommended_actions: Verify authoritative network telemetry for sustained service stability.
Monitor service for 24-48 hours to ensure no recurrence.
Confirm customer satisfaction with the resolution.
reviewer_questions: Has authoritative network telemetry confirmed sustained service stability since the activation retry?
Is there any follow-up required with the customer regarding their previous frustration?
